{{Quote|The slaver Tir'uh has been known to law enforcement agents for decades. An elderly Noehon, she has worked from Kessel to Bnar VII, and probably knows every locale in between where slaves are bought and sold.|Task Force on Alliance Security SecuriDex datafile on the Mytaranor Slaving Council|<ref name="AIR">''[[Alliance Intelligence Reports]]''</ref>}}
'''Bnar VII''' was an astronomical object<ref name="AIR" /> located in the [[Bnar system/Legends|Bnar system]], a part of the [[Braxant sector/Legends|Braxant sector]] in the [[New Territories/Legends|New Territories]] portion of the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories]].<ref name="TEA Bnar" /> The [[Standard decade/Legends|decades]]-long career of the [[Noehon]] [[Slaver/Legends|slaver]] [[Tir'uh]] saw her operate within an area of [[The galaxy/Legends|the galaxy]] spanning from Bnar VII,<ref name="AIR" /> in the northern section of the [[Galaxy/Legends|galaxy]],<ref name="TEA Bnar" /> to [[Kessel/Legends|Kessel]],<ref name="AIR" /> a [[Planet/Legends|planet]] in the galaxy's eastern portion.<ref name="TEA">''[[The Essential Atlas]]''</ref> In [[2 ABY/Legends|2 ABY]],<ref name="Date">''[[Alliance Intelligence Reports]]'' represents a collection of [[in-universe]] reports from "one [[Standard year/Legends|year]] before the [[Battle of Hoth/Legends|Battle of Hoth]]," which corresponds to [[2 ABY/Legends|2 ABY]] according to ''[[The New Essential Chronology]]''.</ref> a [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] [[Task Force on Alliance Security]] [[SecuriDex]] [[Datafile/Legends|datafile]] on the [[Mytaranor Slaving Council]], of which Tir'uh was a member, noted the possibility that the Noehon was familiar with every location between Bnar VII and Kessel that was related to the slaving business.<ref name="AIR" />

==Behind the scenes==
Bnar VII was mentioned in ''[[Alliance Intelligence Reports]]'', a [[1995]] sourcebook for [[West End Games]]' ''[[Star Wars: The Roleplaying Game]]''.<ref name="AIR" /> The [[2009]] reference book ''[[The Essential Atlas]]'' placed the Bnar [[Star system/Legends|system]], and therefore Bnar VII, in grid square K-3.<ref name="TEA Bnar" />
